headline: How The J. M. Smucker (SJM) Investment Story Is Shifting With Activism And Coffee Tailwinds
summary: J. M. Smucker’s fair value price target has been trimmed from $122.40 to $117.81, a modest reset of roughly 3.8% in the implied estimate. That shift lines up with recent mixed analyst commentary, where optimism around activist involvement and coffee cost deflation sits alongside more cautious views tied to execution risks and softer expectations in areas such as Sweet Baked Snacks. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the evolving narrative and what to watch to stay...

headline: Bernstein Maintains Outperform on JM Smucker, Lowers Price Target to $134
summary: Bernstein  analyst Alexia Howard   maintains JM Smucker (NYSE:SJM) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $145 to $134.
